identity.mission: Create a high-tech, Stark Industries-inspired medical HUD interface for Cardiac Solutions LLC.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Medical Precision with Cyberpunk HUD aesthetics.
Emotion First: The UI should feel 'alive', 'secure', and 'advanced'.
Content is King: Data is the hero; display it with clarity and style.
Zoom In: Focus on critical vitals and alerts.
Negative Space: Use deep black space to make neon accents pop.
Contrast: High contrast neon on obsidian black.
anti_patterns: No purple or teal for CTAs (Use Neon Cyan or Electric Blue).
No centered layouts for dashboard (Use Bento/HUD grids).
No generic gradients (Use subtle glows and grid lines).

elements: Flat EKG Line (initially flat, pulses on login)
Background: Deep Obsidian with subtle holographic floor grid (perspective)
Foreground: Two AED electrode pads as custom cursor (or simulated via CSS)
Sidebar: Collapsible or icon-only HUD strip.
Main Area: Widgets with 'corner brackets' (HUD style borders).
Widgets: AED Status, Real-time Monitoring, Subscriber List, Map View.

variants.primary: bg-cyan-500 text-black hover:bg-cyan-400 hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(6,182,212,0.5)] transition-all uppercase tracking-widest font-bold
variants.secondary: border border-slate-700 bg-transparent text-slate-300 hover:border-cyan-500/50 hover:text-cyan-500 uppercase tracking-widest

cards.classes: bg-slate-950/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-slate-800/60 relative overflow-hidden

inputs.classes: bg-transparent border-b border-slate-700 focus:border-cyan-500 focus:ring-0 px-0 rounded-none transition-colors

borders.classes: border-slate-800 relative after:absolute after:inset-0 after:border after:border-cyan-500/20 after:content-['']

glow_effects.usage: Active states, Critical Alerts, Hero Elements

grid_background.css: background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 40px 40px; mask-image: radial-gradient(circle at center, black 40%, transparent 100%);

cursor.description: Custom cursor resembling AED pads. Use CSS 'cursor: url(...), auto' or a custom React component following the mouse position.

background_texture.usage: Low opacity overlay (opacity-10) on dashboard background for tech feel.

general: Do not use gradients for dark colors.
Create depth through layered z-index hierarchy.
specific_to_this_app: Implement the 'Shock' effect on login button click.
The EKG line must be animated.
The cursor must change to AED pads (or a representation) on the login page.
The background must be deep obsidian black (#020617 or #000000).
Use Neon Cyan (#06b6d4) as the primary brand color.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Configure Tailwind with the provided colors and fonts.
3. Create the 'Login' page with the Heart/EKG animation and custom cursor.
4. Create the 'Dashboard' with a Bento Grid layout, using Recharts for AED stats.
5. Use the provided image URLs for textures/product where appropriate.
6. Ensure the 'Stark Industries' aesthetic is maintained via typography, spacing, and borders.
